scripts.dev: npm run build -w @bossassistant/contracts && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @bossassistant/api" "npm run dev -w @bossassistant/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bossassistant/contracts && npm run build -w @bossassistant/api && npm run build -w @bossassistant/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @bossassistant/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @bossassistant/api && npm run typecheck -w @bossassistant/web
scripts.test:e2e: VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8795 npm run build && playwright test
